title: Tome II Act 5: The Hole the Schema Cannot Bind

story.text:
# 📖 Tome II Act 5: The Hole the Schema Cannot Bind
**act** · shared · narrative

The negative space the schema must admit. Bakhta-response · A (C48): trust accumulates as arcs; some hole remains structurally outside.
